release_review.summary: Patch release: fixes the automatic thread-title coordinator so retry timers re-acquire queue ownership before running and recovery scheduling remains idempotent for the same message. No Runtime Service protocol or compatibility window changes.
release_review.same_window_rationale: The release changes only the local AI thread-title coordinator's in-process retry ownership model and tests. It does not add or change Runtime Service snapshot fields, sys.ping payload semantics, attach/start contracts, startup reports, Desktop IPC payloads, Workbench layout contracts, Env App shell readiness, or SSH bootstrap requirements. The existing protocol version, compatibility epoch, minimum Desktop version, and minimum Runtime version remain valid.
checked_surfaces: AI automatic thread-title scheduling, retry, recovery, and fallback ownership
Env App Workbench layered canvas modes and dock routing
Env App Workbench sticky notes, text annotations, and background region persistence
Runtime Workbench layout schema migration and snapshot/event APIs
Workbench projected surface drag, resize, pan, zoom, and theme/mode render transactions
Desktop embedded drag regions during Workbench theme changes
Desktop managed runtime start, attach, and open gating
startup report and local-ui runtime state carriers
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload
Env App desktop first-screen readiness IPC
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap and attach flow
